policy_note: Canonical source: schedule_config.json for targets/custom rules and trainer_profiles.json for availability/certifications. This file documents location guardrails only; trainer ownership is preference unless saved as a hard custom rule.

hard_constraints.description: Kenkere weekly assignment count must never fall below 55
PowerCycle is never scheduled at Kenkere
09:00/09:15/10:00/10:15 morning block should prioritize Tier 1 trainers where qualified and available
Kenkere Tier 1 coverage should prioritize Kajol, Pushyank, and Shruti Kulkarni when qualified and available
Foundations requires certified trainers at Kenkere
Do not schedule proven low-performing class/trainer/slot histories unless manually pinned
